fato_historico: 2015: At least 120 people are killed and 130 injured by a suicide bombing in Diyala Governorate, Iraq.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to cultivate inner peace, Taurus. Even when the world feels heavy with shadows of past tragedies, focus on the persistent light of hope. It is a good time to nurture your spirit, perhaps by connecting with nature, as your steady heart may serve as a healing anchor for those around you today.
frase_do_dia: In the garden of your soul, kindness is the strongest bloom of all.
significado_numero: A lucky number representing wisdom, inner reflection, and spiritual growth.
conselho: Consider planting seeds of joy in your daily routine to invite fresh energy.
